_publications._publicationTitle: C6 Cell Injection into the Optic Nerve of Long-Evans Rats: A Short-Term Model of Optic Pathway Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: Ki67, proliferation marker, expression was found to be high in the region near the injection site while being negative in the control eyes
details: Successfully detected proliferative cells near injection site in test eyes while being negative in control eyes
